title: ajuga × fallax
intro: Ajuga × fallax is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Ajuga reptans and Ajuga pyramidalis, commonly known as bugleweed or dragon's mouth. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to inhibit the activity of thyroid-stimulating hormone and its potential to lower blood pressure. The health benefits of Ajuga × fallax include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help reduce stress and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
